details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest 5 lb ABC under $80 with 4+ stars & free shipping (qty 2) to cart
Task 2: Build restaurant package with 1 primary and 2 secondary extinguishers under price/rating limits
Task 3: Schedule standard office inspection on 15th of next month, 10:00–12:00
Task 4: Request quote for installing 12 hardwired smoke detectors in warehouse
Task 5: Enroll 5 employees in cheapest half-day in-person training near 10001 within 30 miles
Task 6: Sign up for maintenance plan covering 25 extinguishers, monthly billing, <= $600/year
Task 7: Compare two products and add best warranty (and cheaper if tie) to cart
Task 8: Build quote list with 3 different products under price & rating constraints
Task 9: Find most recent home kitchen fire safety article (>=2023) and copy link
